title: Convex Core and the DNSR Model Suite — Reproducibility Companion
description: Companion code and computed artifacts for the research paper "Convex Core and the DNSR Model Suite: A Deterministic ETF Allocation Framework for Drawdown-Controlled Compounding" (2026). Includes the deterministic model engine (zero fitted parameters; no large-language model in the portfolio math), the benchmark / report / Monte-Carlo / sleeve-ablation / regime-validation code, computed result artifacts from which the paper's tables and figures regenerate WITHOUT the licensed vendor data, and self-contained engine tests. The research was conducted by the DNSR Agentic AI system, directed and reviewed by the principal. Hypothetical, backtested performance — not investment advice; past performance does not guarantee future results. Licensing: code under PolyForm Noncommercial 1.0.0; paper and documentation under CC BY-NC 4.0.

creators.name: DNSR Agentic AI system (Anthropic Fable 5 and Opus 4.8)
